description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and lush landscaping. The front features a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, flanked by palm trees and a car parked near the house. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, two shaded cabanas, and several lounge chairs, creating a luxurious outdoor living space. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the property is enclosed by a low hedge. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and landscaped outdoor areas, enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, palm trees, and the pool area with cabanas and lounge chairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the side facade with large windows and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, cabanas, and the back of the bungalow with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, cabanas, and the side of the house with a few windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple facades
